title: Cyrus Saffron Cooperative
summary: Expand a women-led saffron harvest in Khorasan with cold-storage infrastructure.
description: A cooperative of 42 smallholder farms in southern Khorasan is pooling capital to install shared cold-storage and processing facilities. Funds are used to purchase stainless-steel drying racks, vacuum-seal machines, and a refrigerated transport van. The cooperative already exports to three European specialty wholesalers and is targeting a 30% increase in yield with reduced post-harvest loss.

title: Isfahan Tile Revival Workshop
summary: Train a new generation of master tilists in the seven-color haft-rang technique.
description: A two-year apprenticeship program housed in a restored Qajar-era caravanserai. The workshop will produce a signature line of architectural tiles for boutique hotels and restaurants across the Gulf, with a 12% revenue share returning to the apprentice fund.

title: Alborz Solar Microgrid
summary: Three mountain villages gain 24/7 clean power through a community-owned solar array.
description: A 480 kW photovoltaic installation plus battery storage, owned collectively by the residents of three villages in the Alborz range. Excess generation is sold back to the regional grid, with profits funding a local maintenance reserve. Pre-validated by the regional energy authority.

title: Shiraz Pomegranate Cold Chain
summary: Reduce post-harvest losses from 22% to under 5% with on-farm hydrocooling.
description: Twelve pomegranate orchards in the Shiraz region will share three hydrocooling units and a fleet of refrigerated trucks, with the goal of opening direct export channels to South Asian markets.

title: Tehran Fintech Compliance Tool
summary: Open-source AML/KYC toolkit for Iranian fintech startups operating regionally.
description: A self-hosted compliance engine with rules for sanctions screening, transaction monitoring, and SAR filing. The team has two signed pilots with neobanks and will release under a permissive license.

title: Yazd Water-Conservation Courtyards
summary: Restore 18 historic qanat-fed courtyards as models of low-water urban design.
description: A heritage and climate project: restoring wind-catchers, ab anbars, and qanat water systems in 18 courtyards of the old city of Yazd, then opening them as a public learning network for arid-zone architects.

title: Tabriz Carpet Weaving Studio
summary: Direct-to-consumer platform for master weavers, cutting out four middlemen.
description: A digital platform plus physical atelier that lets 24 master weavers in the Tabriz bazaar sell directly to international buyers, with a 3% platform fee funding healthcare for the weavers.

title: Persian Gulf Tidal Pilot
summary: A 2 MW tidal-stream pilot in the Strait of Hormuz, fully reversible installation.
description: A research-stage project to install and monitor three tidal turbines for 18 months, gathering data on marine impact and grid stability before any scale-up decision.

title: Kashan Rosewater Distillery
summary: Modernize a 5th-generation rosewater still without losing traditional character.
description: Replace coal-fired copper boilers with a biogas-fed system while preserving the exact distillation curve that gives the family its signature damask rose oil. A 60% reduction in fuel cost is projected.
